sections.paragraph:
to pierce through with a sword. (Arab. طَعَنَ id., طَعِينُ pierced through, طَعْنَةُ stroke. Chald. Pael, id.)

Pual pass. Isa 14:19.

II.

טען

to load beasts of burden, Gen 45:17. (Aram. טְעֵן, ܛܥܶܢ to be laden. Arab. ظعن VIII. to sit on a camel, ظَعُونُ a loaded camel, ظعينة a camel’s saddle. Compare צָעַן.)
